scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.free:5173: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if($p){ $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ('Stopped PID ' + $_ + ' on port 5173') } } else { Write-Host 'Port 5173 is free' }"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run free:5173 && npm run dev
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix client run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.start:clean: npm run free:5173 && npm run start
